scenarioName: Care Manager - John Doe Care Plan
description: Reviewing diabetes management care plan progress

goals.name: Walk 30 minutes daily
goals.description: Physical activity goal for cardiovascular health

mockAHISResponse.summary: John Doe's Diabetes Management Plan shows mixed progress. While physical activity goals are on track (75% complete), the diabetes education program is overdue with only 2 of 5 modules completed. The primary HbA1c goal is progressing but the latest reading of 7.8% still exceeds the target of <7.0%. There is one high-priority overdue goal requiring immediate attention.

insights.title: Overdue Education Goal
insights.description: Diabetes self-management education program is 2 weeks overdue with only 40% completion. Patient has completed 2 of 5 modules. Recommend immediate outreach to understand barriers and reschedule remaining sessions.

insights.title: HbA1c Above Target
insights.description: Latest HbA1c reading of 7.8% exceeds the target of <7.0%. Current trajectory suggests goal may not be met by March 2025 target date without intervention adjustment.

insights.title: Physical Activity Progress
insights.description: Patient is averaging 22 minutes of daily walking, approaching the 30-minute goal. Positive trend observed over the past month.

insights.title: Medication Review Due
insights.description: Monthly medication review is due. Consider medication adjustment given HbA1c above target.

suggestedActions.title: Reschedule Education Sessions
suggestedActions.description: Contact patient to reschedule remaining 3 diabetes education modules. Explore barriers to completion such as transportation or scheduling conflicts.

suggestedActions.title: Review Medication Regimen
suggestedActions.description: Schedule medication review with endocrinologist to discuss potential adjustments given current HbA1c levels.

suggestedActions.title: Update Goal Target Dates
suggestedActions.description: Adjust target dates for overdue goals based on patient discussion and realistic timeline.

suggestedActions.title: Coordinate Nutritionist Follow-up
suggestedActions.description: Ensure nutritionist appointment on December 10th is confirmed and patient is prepared.

changesSinceLastVisit: Diabetes education goal became overdue (was due Nov 15)
HbA1c goal progress increased from 55% to 60%
Physical activity goal progress increased from 70% to 75%
